# gh aw version

Show the installed gh-aw extension version.

## When to use it

Use when confirming installation or comparing behavior across versions.

## How to use it

1. Start with `gh aw version --help` to see the flags for your installed version.
2. Run the smallest command that answers your immediate need.
3. Review the diff or GitHub-side effect before moving on when the command changes repository state.

## Example commands

- `gh aw version`
- `gh aw --version`

## Notes

- This is a good first command after installing gh-aw.

## Verify

- Re-run `gh aw version --help` if you are unsure about supported flags in the installed release.
